summary: A clip from a Fox Carolina news segment. A graphic displays a booking-style photo of a man with dark hair labeled with a name, under a header reading CHARGED, OCONEE COUNTY. A FOX CAROLINA logo and a time-and-temperature readout appear in the lower-right.

script.scene: A graphic shows a booking photo labeled with a name under the header CHARGED, OCONEE COUNTY.
The same graphic remains displayed with the FOX CAROLINA logo.
